description: Provided 66 UCLA campus tours to 1,400+ K-8 students to foster interest in higher education.
achievements: Conducted 66 comprehensive tours highlighting academic opportunities, student life, and campus history.
Presented to audiences of up to 40 guests per tour, tailoring messaging to K-8 students and parents.
Fostered early interest in higher education for over 1,400 students from diverse school districts.

description: Led large-scale simulations and authored detailed background guides on maritime security and autonomous ships.
achievements: Served as Head Chair for a 150-delegate International Maritime Organization committee.
Authored a 30-page background guide on Maritime Autonomous Surface Ships and maritime security.
Trained and supervised three dais members to facilitate debate and resolution drafting.

description: Provided weekly one-on-one math tutoring to elementary school students during remote learning.
achievements: Provided weekly one-on-one math tutoring to an elementary school student over two years.
Designed targeted arithmetic and problem-solving exercises to keep students engaged.
Helped close remote learning gaps and improve student confidence in mathematics.
